Singed Scroll  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Singed Scroll
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Item Lore:A Singed Scroll
Language:Elder Dragon
Item Type:Book
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Melany - Tunare
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:04
Page Updated:Sun Mar 22nd, 2009

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50
[Book Text | Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
Overking Bathezid
The Fabled Overking Bathezid

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Lake Rathetear
Quest Name
Cleric Epic: Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Chardok
Book Text:

Greetings Overking Bathezid. The time has come for you to return the boon owed to me from so long ago. I have need of your most powerful summoners to bring Ixiblat Fer into the mortal realm and reign fire upon my enemies. Your old friend, Zordak Ragefire.
 


Uploaded October 13th, 2019 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Cleric Epic Changes via 3-10 patch
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2021 at 9:36 AM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
- - - Only someone that has handed Sceptre of Ixiblat Fer and Singed Scroll to Omat will receive the Shimmering Pearl when handing A Message to Natasha to Natasha.
- - - Once you hand A Message to Natasha to Natasha you will have to hand a new Sceptre of Ixiblat Fer and Singed Scroll to Omat for Natasha to accept another Message from you.
____________________________
Allakhazam Developer and Admin

For real time update information on Allakhazam, follow me on Twitter!
https://twitter.com/gidono

Or join us via our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/zu9tTS7
▲ Page top
first try and easy..
QuoteReply
# May 15 2007 at 1:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754428866
12 posts
Went in there Last night with 66 cleric(brother), 65 mage(me) and 63 necro(wife) and had no issues.. had my cleric die and then i just corpse pulled him down.. all 3 of us KOS in chardok, 66 cleric had rogue parked to unlock doors and then coh his cleric thru locked door with my mage..

When got to Overking 66 cleric pacified 2 of the the mobs on both sides of his room walls, I pulled with mala type spell and the one i mala'd came with only the overking.. 2 mobs, killed add easily, then burnt down the overking in about a min. logged on my cleric, got rezzed in, looted scroll and gated out.
▲ Page top
3 Tries
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2006 at 12:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591870519008
10 posts
Well, it took me 3 tries to get this and the reason is that I didn't read any posts before I tried it.
The 1st time, there was only 3 of us in a group. Me, 70 war, and 70 dru. Then, we met up with another group and started raid. We got mobbed and died.
The 2nd time, we had a pretty good group, but no Rog. When we got down there, we realized that we needed the Rog for a lockpick.
Third times a charm. We did it easily with me (25 Clr), 70 war, 70 dru, 70 bard, 70 rog, 70 mnk, and 56 bst. All 70s had 10k+ hit points. My clr was there for a tag-along of course. Couldn't do much of anything to help out.
Maybe you won't go through all this. Maybe your first time will be a charm. Just don't forget that ROGUE! Happy Huntings Clerics!
▲ Page top
Paci
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2005 at 1:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1666570650774
25 posts
You can Paci this room. Single pulled King tonight with 70 Bard. Used 61 Paci song (Silent Song of Quellious). 1ST Attempt I used 66 Song that Reduces agro range, got 3 adds. Faded swapped songs and singled him out.

Hope this Helps



Felmid 70 Bard of Veeshan

Pick Pocket
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2005 at 11:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252456344
Scholar
208 posts
Have any level 70 rogues tried to pick pocket this?

It is not flagged as magic, and the pp limit was always (Rogue Level - 5), but I haven't read of anyone stealing from a level 65 mob yet.
▲ Page top
Pet Pull
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2004 at 7:00 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788668372
94 posts
Since the room cant be Pac'd...why not get an SK or Nec., buff their pet best you can (including shrew). Any SK/Nec worth their salt knows how to pet pull singles out of a full room. It's no secret but I'm not gonna tell ya how its done. As a 66 SK I've not tried it in this room but I can pull any single mob out of any room that I've seen so far. Hope this little tip helps.

Deynaa Schadenfreuden (66SK) Bristlebane
▲ Page top
RE: Pet Pull
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2005 at 3:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1714954568226
67 posts
I dont understand why this room couldnt be pacied, the mobs arent nothin special same old ones as the rest of the zone. When i got my cleric his scroll, i pacied the room. How to go about pacing the room is easy if ya got a good rog that let you in. And the secret you so cherish is a simple fd send pet in trick, real hard. This is an information board not a taunt you with tricks and say things that arent true.

Posting this after i just killed him. i can confirm my earlier post, cause we just did him all that were pacied, didnt agro.

Predator Danknugzz Arethegoodnugzz - 68 Bst - Torvo
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?=999412

Edited, Sat Jan 15 23:24:30 2005

# Jan 12 2005 at 10:02 AM Rating: Decent
DrexelNecromancer
Scholar
166 posts
It's posts like this that are TRULY useless. This board is not about bragging and withholding secrets but about sharing information. It's "not a secret" but you're not going to share it? Give me a break, loser.

Edited, Wed Jan 12 10:02:51 2005
▲ Page top
Overking update
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2004 at 9:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591807807657
13 posts
Apparently, there has been an update to the overking room. Just did this raid last weekend. Everything was great, got the Prince, and was camped outside the king's room. Then we got wiped. The reason is the server update to the room. A guildie read an article after wipe =). You can't pacify the room and pull the king anymore. If the king comes, everyone in room comes, pacified or not. Seems the new tactic is pacify king and as many others and clear the room front to back, taking on king last. Did it with three groups averaging 56 (main group was 63+).
▲ Page top
My Cleric Hubby
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2004 at 12:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803731134
1 post
Hi All - I am planning to do this raid with my hubby cleric (Medisen) on Maelin Starpyre very soon...he is 66 now and still NO EPIC! The group we run with is: 63 War, 61 Bard, 63 Dru, 59 Monk and a 59 Pally (I'm the Pally). Do we have the right group for this? I'm usually the one pulling and I do very well with paci, but these mobs will probably resist mine. Medisen has the latest area paci, maybe that will work?? I'm just concerned about the adds around the Overking. Any help or suggestions?? Also, I am not familiar with where exactly the Overking hangs out, is it easy to find? I have the map, but of course it is not marked! Thanks ALL...happy hunting!

This guy is doable with one 65 group. IF you have a good puller who can pull Overking WITHOUT is friends. He is not as tough as he used to be.
